description: Medium size / Full render — the v6 Plug Puller (v6.0/CAD/v6.0.stl, 'Plug Puller 3.1 - B'). All plug measurements at their defaults; values route through FIT_MEASURED, which reproduces PRESET_MEDIUM exactly (the Medium-parity invariant, cross-checked against the reference mesh by tests/test_reference_parity.py).
